settings.title: VURA SKINCARE
settings.text: Pure. Mineral-Powered. Apothecary-Tradition. Handcrafted small batches from India's geothermal deposits.

settings.hero_text: Vura formulations start with a single mineral and at most three botanicals — logged, dated, and tied back to the lot it came from. No marketing actives. No proprietary blends. Just the archive.

settings.title: Where Nature Meets Alchemy
settings.text: Each Vura formula begins with a single mineral and ends with five ingredients on the label. Clean, simple, and bottled in small batches with local rosewater and fresh aloe juice.
